name: Seized
description: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's successful melee Attack if the target was within 1 hex of a treasure token.

name: Break Out
description: Score this immediately at the end of your opponent's Action step if 2 or more friendly fighters are in neutral and/or enemy territory.

name: Claimed
description: Score this immediately at the end of your opponent's Action step if 3 or more friendly fighters are covetous.

name: Pound for Pound
description: Score this immediately after a friendly covetous fighter's successful Attack that targeted an enemy fighter with a Bounty characteristic of 2 or more that was within 1 hex of a treasure token. If you are the underdog, score this if the target had a Bounty characteristic of 1 or more.

name: All Part of the Plan
description: Score this immediately after your Action step if an enemy fighter that was holding a treasure token when they were picked to be the target of a friendly fighter's attack is no longer holding that treasure token and you hold that treasure token.

name: Calculated Strike
description: Score this immediately after you make an Attack roll for a friendly covetous fighter if any of the results was a Critical success.

name: Audacity
description: Score this in an end phase if a friendly covetous fighter made a successful Attack in the preceding combat phase while they were in enemy territory.

name: Close the Vice
description: Score this in an end phase if 3 different friendly covetous fighters Attacked in the preceding combat phase.

name: Slow Advance
description: Score this in an end phase if your warband holds any treasure tokens in both neutral territory and enemy territory.

name: Domination
description: Score this in an end phase if 3 or more friendly fighters are within 1 hex of different treasure tokens.

name: Lone Wolves
description: Score this in an end phase if 2 or more friendly fighters are within 1 hex of the same treasure token and none of those fighters is adjacent to another fighter.

name: Skin of Their Teeth
description: Score this in an end phase if 2 or more friendly fighters are holding treasure tokens and any of those fighters are damaged.

name: Pilfer
description: Pick a friendly fighter. Push that fighter 1 hex. That push must end within 1 hex of a treasure token.

name: Move at the Opening
description: Play this immediately after a friendly fighter Moves. Pick a different friendly fighter with no Move or Charge tokens. That fighter Moves and must end that Move within 1 hex of a treasure token.

name: Organised Efforts
description: Pick 2 friendly fighters holding treasure tokens. Remove those fighters from the battlefield and then place each on the treasure token the other was removed from.

name: Defiance
description: Play this immediately after you pick a weapon as part of an Attack for a friendly fighter within 1 hex of a treasure token. That weapon has +1 Attack dice for that Attack.

name: Into the Deepwoods
description: Pick a friendly fighter within 1 hex of a treasure token that is in neutral or enemy territory. Give that fighter a Guard token.

name: Unearthed Treasure
description: Pick a cover token that does not have a fighter on it. Flip that cover token.

name: Territorial Welcome
description: Pick an undamaged enemy fighter within 1 hex of a treasure token. Melee Attacks that target that enemy fighter in the next turn have Cleave.

name: Hold the Line!
description: Fighters cannot be driven back. This effect persists until the end of the next Action step.

name: Dig In
description: Play this immediately after a friendly fighter within 1 hex of a treasure token is picked as the target of an Attack. You can re-roll 1 Save dice in the Save roll for that Attack.

name: The High Ground
description: Play this immediately after you pick a weapon as part of an Attack for a friendly fighter within 1 hex of a treasure token. That weapon has Grapple and Brutal for that Attack.

name: Wily Prospector
description: This fighter is covetous while they are within 1 hex of a cover token.

name: Cautious Attitude
description: This fighter's Range 1 weapons have +2 Range while they are covetous. While the target of this fighter's Attack is 3 or more hexes from this fighter, this fighter's Range 1 melee weapons have a maximum Damage characteristic of 2. Immediately after this fighter makes a successful Attack if the target was 3 or more hexes from this fighter, discard this card.

name: Mirror Shield
description: Ranged attacks that target this fighter have -1 Attack dice.

name: Driven by Pain
description: Insensate: Immediately after this fighter is driven back, you can heal this fighter.

name: Inviolate
description: This fighter cannot be Flanked or Surrounded while they hold a treasure token.

name: Opportunist
description: Unearth: Immediately after an enemy fighter has Charged, if this fighter is within 1 hex of a cover token, flip that cover token.

name: Overreach
description: While this fighter is within 1 hex of a treasure token, their ranged weapons have +2 Range. Immediately discard this Upgrade after this fighter makes a successful ranged Attack while they are within 1 hex of a treasure token.

name: Spiteful Defender
description: This fighter's melee weapons have Grievous while they are within 1 hex of a treasure token and have no Charge tokens.

name: I Like Those Odds
description: This fighter has +1 Save (to a maximum of 2) while they hold an odd-numbered treasure token.

name: Starmaw
description: Ranged Attack action. Hex 4 Hammer Smash. 2 Damage 1 Stagger. This weapon has +1 Attack dice while the attacker is within 1 hex of a treasure token.

name: Back Off!
description: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's Attack if that Attack pushed an enemy fighter into a different territory.

name: Bloodscent
description: Score this in an end phase if any enemy fighters in friendly territory have 2 or more damage tokens and/or are vulnerable. If you are the underdog, those enemy fighters can be in enemy territory instead.

name: Hands Off!
description: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's Attack if the target was on a feature token and was driven back.

name: Home Advantage
description: Score this immediately after an enemy fighter's failed Attack if the target was a friendly fighter in friendly territory.

name: Lead by Example
description: Score this in an end phase if your leader is in friendly territory and Attacked 2 or more times this battle round.

name: No Business Here
description: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's Attack if the target was in friendly territory and was Flanked and/or Surrounded.

name: No Trespassers
description: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's successful Attack if that Attack took an enemy fighter out of action in friendly territory.

name: Pinned!
description: Score this in an end phase if an enemy fighter was driven back into an edge hex in friendly territory this battle round.

name: Ready or Not
description: Score this in an end phase if 2 or more enemy fighters in friendly territory are damaged and/or adjacent to each other.

name: Spoiling for a Fight
description: Score this in an end phase if 2 or more friendly fighters in friendly territory have no Move or Charge tokens and are within 1 hex of an enemy fighter.

name: This is Our Turf!
description: Score this in an end phase if there are more friendly fighters with Move and/or Charge tokens in friendly territory than there are enemy fighters with Move and/or Charge tokens in friendly territory.

name: Usurped
description: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's successful Attack if the target was on a feature token and the attacker ended that Attack on that feature token.

name: Audacious Denial
description: If your leader is in friendly territory, pick an enemy fighter adjacent to them in friendly territory. Your leader immediately Attacks that fighter with 1 of their melee weapons that has a Damage characteristic of 1.

name: Deny Invaders
description: In the next turn, friendly fighters' weapons have +1 Attack dice while they are in friendly territory.

name: Hidden Snares
description: Pick an enemy fighter in friendly territory and within 1 hex of a feature token. If you are the underdog, you can pick an enemy fighter in enemy territory and within 1 hex of a feature token instead. That fighter's weapons have -1 Attack dice in the next turn.

name: Keep Them at Bay
description: In the next turn, friendly fighters' Range 1 melee weapons have +1 Range when targeting an enemy fighter in friendly territory.

name: Mind Your Step
description: Pick an enemy fighter in friendly territory. Push that fighter up to 2 hexes. That push must end in neutral or enemy territory.

name: Mystical Misdirection
description: Pick a friendly fighter and an enemy fighter, each within 1 hex of a treasure token. Swap those fighters.

name: Paths Unknown
description: Pick a friendly fighter in friendly territory. If you are the underdog, you can pick a friendly fighter in enemy territory instead. In the next turn, that fighter cannot be picked to be the target of an Attack.

name: Poor Footing
description: Pick an enemy fighter in friendly territory. That fighter is vulnerable in the next turn.

name: Secrets of the Realm
description: Pick a feature token in friendly territory. Until the end of the next Action step, that feature token is treated as if it were a treasure token.

name: Sidestep
description: Pick a friendly fighter. Push that fighter 1 hex.

name: Balance of Ghyran
description: Equilibrium: Immediately after an enemy fighter's successful Attack, if this fighter was the target of that Attack and the attacker is within 3 hexes of them, roll 3 Attack dice. If the roll contains any Fury, inflict 1 damage on the attacker.

name: Blocked!
description: This fighter cannot be the target of a Charge action while they are in friendly territory.

name: Bounty of Ghyran
description: At the start of each Action step, if this fighter is in friendly territory, heal 1 damage from this fighter.

name: Crippling Blow
description: This fighter's melee weapons have Grievous while they are in friendly territory.

name: Goading Defender
description: This fighter has +1 Save while they are in friendly territory. Discard this card if this fighter is picked to be the target of a Ploy or is damaged.

name: Great Speed
description: This fighter has +1 Move.

name: Hidden Aid
description: Enemy fighters adjacent to this fighter are Flanked.

name: Hidden Traps
description: When an enemy fighter ends a Move or Charge action within 1 hex of this fighter in friendly territory, roll 1 Attack dice. On a Critical success, inflict 1 damage on that enemy fighter.

name: Killing Blow
description: This fighter's melee weapons have Grievous if the target is damaged.

name: True Grit
description: This fighter has +1 Health.

name: Aggressive Unity
description: Score this in an end phase if 3 or more melee Attacks were made by united friendly fighters this battle round.

name: Beatdown
description: Score this in an end phase if the same enemy fighter was picked to be the target of 3 or more different friendly fighters' melee Attacks this battle round.

name: Closed Down
description: Score this in an end phase if a united friendly fighter is holding a treasure token that was held by an enemy fighter this battle round.
faq:
Q: For the ‘Closed Down’ Objective, does a treasure token count as having been held by an enemy fighter if that fighter moved over the token but did not end their move on the token?
A: No.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Got Your Back!
description: Score this immediately after an enemy fighter's failed Attack if the target was a unite friendly fighter.

name: Helping Hand
description: Score this immediately after a united friendly fighter's successful Attack if the Attack roll contained any Single support.

name: Hemmed In
description: Score this in an end phase if an enemy leader was slain by a united friendly fighter this battle round.

name: Inevitable Outcome
description: Score this in an end phase if 2 or more united friendly fighter are adjacent to the same enemy fighter.

name: Infiltrate
description: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's successful Attack if the target was in neutral or enemy territory and either the attacker was united or the target was Flanked and/or Surrounded.

name: Outmuscle
description: Score this in an end phase if an enemy fighter was driven back as part of a united friendly fighter's successful Attack this battle round.

name: Tag Team
description: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's successful Attack if they have no Move or Charge tokens and either the attacker was united or the target was Flanked and/or Surrounded.

name: Tandem Assault
description: Score this immediately after an enemy fighter is slain by a friendly fighter's Attack if the attacker was united or the target was Flanked and/or Surrounded.

name: United Aid
description: Score this immediately after you make a Save roll for a united friendly fighter if there were more successes in the Save roll than the Attacker roll and the Save roll contained any Single support. If you are the underdog, the Save roll does not have to contain any Single support.

name: Another Swing
description: Play this immediately after a united friendly fighter's failed melee Attack if the attacker is adjacent to 2 united friendly fighters. That fighter Attacks again using a melee weapon, but the Damage characteristic of that weapon is reduced to 1.

name: Army of Two
description: Pick a friendly fighter. That fighter is united in the next turn.

name: Brother-in-Arms
description: Play this immediately before you pick a melee weapon as part of a united friendly fighter's Attack. Pick a united friendly fighter adjacent to the attacker. Use 1 of that fighter's melee weapons for that Attack instead.
faq:
Q: Does the attacking fighter need to have a melee weapon to pick (either on their fighter card or as an Upgrade) prior to using ‘Brother-in-Arms’?
A: Yes.

Q: An attacking fighter picks another friendly fighter’s melee weapon using ‘Brother-in-Arms’. The fighter whose melee weapon is being used (not the attacking fighter) is equipped with the ‘Keen Eye’ Upgrade. Does the weapon still have +1 Attack dice for that Attack?
A: No.

Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Defiant Duo
description: Pick 2 adjacent united friendly fighters. If you are the underdog, pick 2 united friendly fighters instead. Give 1 of those fighters a Guard token and then heal the other fighter.

name: Out of Nowhere
description: Play this immediately after you make an Attack roll for a united friendly fighter. Change 1 dice in that Attack roll to Single support or Double support.

name: Selfless Parry
description: Play this immediately after a united friendly fighter is picked to be the target of an Attack. Pick a united friendly fighter adjacent to the target. The target has that fighter's Save characteristic for that Attack.

name: Sidestep
description: Pick a friendly fighter. Push that fighter 1 hex.

name: Take One for the Team
description: Play this immediately after a united friendly fighter is picked to be the target of an Attack. Pick a united friendly fighter adjacent to the target and within range of the weapon being used for the Attack. That fighter must be the target of that Attack instead.

name: Timed Strike
description: Play this immediately after you pick a melee weapon as part of an Attack for a friendly fighter that is not united. That weapon has +1 Attack dice for that Attack.

name: Unified Front
description: United friendly fighters have +1 Save in the next turn, to a maximum of 3.

name: Battering Ram
description: (Errata update) Attack rolls made for this fighter as part of melee Attacks always count as having more Critical success than the Save roll for the purposes of Stand Fast and Overrun.
faq:
Q: If a fighter equipped with the ‘Battering Ram’ Upgrade Attacks a target using the ‘Manipulated Fate’ or ‘Phantasmal Forms’ abilities, does the target still Stand Fast?
A: Yes.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Coordinated Deathblow
description: Melee Attack action. Hex 1, Fury 3, Damage 2. This weapon has Grievous while this fighter is united.

name: Duellist
description: Footwork: Immediately after this fighter has Attacked, you can push this fighter 1 hex.

name: Entangling Strike
description: Melee Attack action. Hex 1, Smash 3, Damage 1. This weapon has Cleave and Ensnare if the target is Flanked and/or Surrounded.

name: Great Fortitude
description: This fighter has +1 Health.

name: Keen Eye
description: This fighter's melee weapons have +1 Attack dice.

name: Rush to Aid
description: Assist: Immediately after this fighter has Attacked, you can pick a united friendly fighter. Push this fighter up to 2 hexes. That push must end adjacent to that united friendly fighter.

name: Shared Incentive
description: This upgrade can only be given to your leader. This fighter has +1 Move. United friendly fighters have +1 Move if they are adjacent to this fighter when they start that Move.

name: Spurred Momentum
description: Driven: Immediately after this fighter's successful Attack, if this fighter was united, remove their Move and Stagger tokens and then discard this card.

name: Titan of Combat
description: This fighter is united.

name: Aggressive Expansion
description: Score this in an end phase if 3 or more enraged friendly fighters are in enemy territory.

name: Best Foot Forward
description: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's successful Attack if that fighter has any Charge tokens and is in enemy territory.

name: Blinded by Rage
description: Score this immediately after an enemy fighter is slain by an enraged friendly fighter's melee Attack if that friendly fighter was enraged at the start of the turn.

name: Coordinated Assault
description: Score this immediately after an Action step if each friendly fighter is enraged and in enemy territory.

name: Into the Fire
description: Score this in an end phase if your leader is in enemy territory and within 2 hexes of 2 or more other fighters.

name: No Contest
description: Score this in an end phase if an enemy leader is slain.

name: No Escape
description: Score this in an end phase if each friendly fighter is enraged and in enemy territory, and no enemy fighters are in your territory.

name: No Respite
description: Score this immediately after an opponent's Action step if there is an enraged friendly fighter in each territory.

name: Overwhelming Presence
description: Score this in an end phase if each friendly fighter is enraged and there are no fighters holding treasure tokens.

name: Sever the Head
description: Score this immediately after an enemy leader is slain by an enraged friendly fighter's melee Attack.

name: Supreme Slayer
description: Score this immediately after your leader's successful Attack if the target was slain and that was the second or subsequent fighter slain by your leader.

name: Unrelenting Massacre
description: Score this in an end phase if all fighters have Charge tokens.

name: Adrenaline Rush
description: Pick up to 2 enraged friendly fighters. Remove their Stagger tokens.

name: Honed Reflexes
description: Domain: Each time you make a Save roll for an enraged friendly fighter, you can re-roll 1 Save dice in that Save roll. This effect persists until the end of the battle round or until another Domain card is played.

name: Knife to the Heart
description: Pick an enemy fighter that is not vulnerable and that is adjacent to an enraged friendly fighter. Inflict 1 damage on that enemy fighter. Then, remove that friendly fighter's Rage tokens.

name: Murderlust
description: Play this immediately after an enraged friendly fighter's melee Attack fails. Friendly fighters' melee weapons have +1 Attack dice while targeting the target of that failed Attack until the end of the battle round.

name: Senseless Haste
description: Friendly fighters have +1 Move in the next turn. After any friendly fighters Move in your next turn, give that fighter a Stagger token.

name: Slayer's Aid
description: Pick an enraged friendly fighter. Push that fighter up to 3 hexes. That push must end adjacent to your leader.

name: Slayer's Arena
description: Domain: After each failed Attack, give the attacker a Stagger token. This effect persists until the end of the battle round or until another Domain card is played.

name: Venting Strike
description: Play this immediately after you pick a melee weapon as part of an Attack made by an enraged friendly fighter. That weapon has +1 Attack dice for that Attack. Immediately after that Attack, remove that fighter's Rage tokens.

name: What Pain?
description: Pick up to 2 enraged friendly fighters. Heal those fighters. Then, remove their Rage tokens and give them a Stagger token.

name: Wrong-footed Stance
description: Domain: If a fighter enters or is placed in a stagger hex, give them a Move token in addition to a Stagger token. This effect persists until the end of the battle round or until another Domain card is played.

name: Agile
description: Deft: After you make a Save roll for this fighter, you can immediately re-roll 1 Save dice in that Save roll.

name: Aggressive Ambusher
description: While this fighter is enraged, their melee weapons have Cleave and Ensnare if the target is Flanked and/or Surrounded.

name: Angered Swing
description: Melee Attack action Range 1 Sword 3 Damage 2 A fighter can only use this weapon while enraged. When using the Raging Strike ability with this weapon, you must re-roll each Attack dice instead.

name: Assured Bloodshed
description: While this fighter is enraged, their melee weapons have Grapple and Brutal.

name: Gifted Vitality
description: Heal this fighter at the end of each battle round.

name: Haymaker
description: This fighter's melee weapons (excluding Upgrades) have the Lethal Weapon ability. After this fighter make a successful Attack with Lethal, discard this card.Lethal: That fighter's weapon has +2 Damage for that Attack, to a maximum of 4.
faq:
Q: How does the ‘Haymaker’ Upgrade work with damage reduction? For example, if you Attacked a target using a Damage 3 weapon that has Lethal, and the target either had the ‘Desperate Defence’ Upgrade or used Stand Fast to subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic, would you inflict 4 damage or 3 damage?
A: 4 damage. Apply all modifiers first (+2 Damage, -1 Damage), and then apply the damage cap afterwards.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Keen Eye
description: This fighter's melee weapons have +1 Attack dice.

name: Murderous Instincts
description: This fighter's Range 1 melee weapons (excluding Upgrades) have Grievous.This fighter cannot use Core abilities other than the Charge ability.

name: Stubborn to the Bone
description: While this fighter is enraged, this fighter cannot be pushed or given Stagger tokens.

name: United in Anger
description: Rally Together: Immediately after an enraged friendly fighter is pushed, you can push this fighter up to 1 hex closer to that fighter.

name: A Sure Bet
description: Score this immediately after raiding an Emberstone card after a melee Attack if the Attack roll contained 3 or more Attack dice.

name: Certain Aggression
description: Score this in an end phase if you raided 2 or more times this battle round and there are no enemy fighters in friendly territory.

name: Critical Risk
description: Score this immediately after raiding an Emberstone card if the preceding Attack was successful and the Attack roll included any Critical success.

name: Emberstone Stash
description: Score this in an end phase if you raided 4 or more different Emberstone cards this battle round.

name: Hoarder's Hovel
description: Score this in an end phase if any friendly fighters are holding a treasure token that has a value equal to that fighter's Bounty characteristic.

name: Invade
description: Score this in an end phase if you raided any Emberstone cards this battle round after a melee Attack if the target was holding a treasure token.

name: Looted Realmstone
description: Score this immediately after raiding 2 or more different Emberstone cards from the same melee attack.

name: Pillage
description: Score this immediately after raiding 2 or more different Emberstone cards after a melee Attack if the target was in neutral or enemy territory.
faq:
Q: To score ‘Pillage’, do you have to raid 2 different Emberstone cards after the same melee Attack?
A: Yes.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Ragerock Strike
description: Score this immediately after resolving the Emberstone Ploy ability or the Emberstone Upgrade ability (see Plot card).

name: Realmstone Raid
description: Score this in an end phase if you raided 3 or more times after different friendly fighters Attacked this battle round.
faq:
Q: Can you clarify the conditions for scoring ‘Realmstone Raid’?
A: ‘Realmstone Raid’ can be scored in an end phase if you raided 3 or more times and those raids happened after the Attacks of at least 2 different friendly fighters.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Reckless Gambit
description: Score this immediately after raiding an Emberstone card for the second or subsequent time this battle round and each Emberstone card raided was a different card.

name: Roused Violence
description: Score this in an end phase if the number of treasure tokens on the battlefield is equal to or less than the number of Emberstone cards you raided this battle round.

name: Ambush
description: Play this immediately after picking a ranged weapon as part of an Attack. You can raid after a successful friendly ranged Attack instead of a melee Attack this turn.

name: Angered Focus
description: Emberstone PloyPick a friendly fighter holding a treasure token in friendly territory that does not have any Move, Charge or Stagger tokens. Raid a number of cards equal to that fighter's Bounty characteristic. Cards raided this way do not count as having been raided as a result of a successful Attack.

name: A Step Ahead
description: Emberstone PloyPick a friendly fighter in neutral or enemy territory. Push that fighter 1 hex. That push must end closer to an enemy fighter.

name: Fortune Faded
description: Pick a friendly fighter adjacent to an enemy fighter that is not vulnerable. Inflict 1 damage on both fighters.

name: Hidden Knowledge
description: Emberstone PloyPick an enemy fighter adjacent to a friendly fighter. Give that fighter a Move token.

name: Intoxicated with Rage
description: Emberstone PloyPick a friendly fighter that has no Move and/or Charge tokens. Give that fighter a Guard token.

name: Manipulated Fate
description: Play this immediately after a friendly fighter is picked as the target of an Attack. Save rolls made for that Attack count as having more Critical success than the Attack roll for the purposes of the Stand Fast ability.

name: Misstep
description: Emberstone PloyPick an enemy fighter. Give that fighter a Stagger token.

name: Raider's Rapture
description: Domain: When you raid, you can reveal 1 additional card. This effect persists until the end of the round or until another Domain card is played.
faq:
Q: If ‘Raider’s Rapture’ is in effect, when I raid, can I reveal a number of additional cards equal to the target’s Bounty characteristic? And are each of those cards considered to have been raided?
A: Yes to both.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Raider's Premonition
description: Emberstone PloyPick an Objective card from your hand and put it on the bottom of your Objective deck. Then draw 1 Objective card.

name: Armour Piercer
description: Emberstone Upgrade:Breached: Immediately after a drawn Attack made by this fighter, if the Damage characteristic of the attacker's weapon is greater than the target's Save characteristic, inflict 1 damage on the target. Then discard this card.

name: Brightstone Vigour
description: Emberstone Upgrade:Soothed by Slaughter: Immediately after a successful Attack made by this fighter, if the Damage characteristic of the weapon used is greater than the Save characteristic of the target, you can heal the attacker. Then discard this card.
faq:
Q: Does ‘Brightstone Vigour’ check the Damage and Save characteristics during the combat sequence?
A: No.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Call to Power
description: Emberstone Upgrade:Heed the Call: Immediately after a successful Attack made by this fighter, you can draw 1 Power card. Then discard this card.

name: Emberstone Edge
description: Emberstone Upgrade:Melee Attack action Range 1 Axe 2 Damage 1  This weapon has +1 Attack dice if you raided in the same phase.

name: Forgotten Fortune
description: Emberstone Upgrade:Lingering Power: Immediately after a successful Attack made by this fighter, you can pick 1 Emberstone Ploy from your Power discard pile. Add it to your hand. Then discard this card.

name: Great Fortitude
description: This fighter has +1 Health.

name: Great Speed
description: This fighter has +1 Move.

name: Great Strength
description: This fighter's melee weapons have Grievous.

name: Keen Eye
description: This fighter's melee weapons have +1 Attack dice.

name: Reforged Aid
description: Emberstone Upgrade:Salvaged Arms: Immediately after a successful Attack made by this fighter, you can pick 1 Emberstone Upgrade from your Power discard pile. Add it to your hand. Then discard this card.

name: Aggressive Defender
description: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's Attack if the attacker is holding a treasure token.
faq:
Q: Can ‘Aggressive Defender’ be scored if a friendly fighter uses either the ‘Swift Step’ or ‘Duellist’ Upgrade to push them onto a treasure token after the Attack was made?
A: No.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: All In
description: Score this in an end phase if there are no tempered friendly fighters in friendly territory and any tempered friendly fighters are in neutral and/or enemy territory.

name: Behind Enemy Lines
description: Score this immediately after an opponent's Action step if a tempered friendly fighter holds a feature token in enemy territory.

name: Calm Before the Storm
description: Score this in an end phase if there are any damaged fighters and those fighters are not adjacent.
faq:
Q: Can I score ‘Calm Before the Storm’ as long as no damaged fighters are adjacent to each other, even if they are adjacent to undamaged fighters?
A: Yes.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Double Team
description: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's successful Attack if the target was Flanked by a friendly fighter.

name: Immovable
description: Score this immediately after an opponent's Action step if a friendly fighter was the target of an Attack in that Action step while they were tempered and the target was not slain.

name: Power in Numbers
description: Score this immediately after an Action step if 3 or more tempered fighters with no Move tokens are adjacent. If you are the underdog score this if 2 or more tempered fighters with no Move tokens are adjacent instead.
faq:
Q: To score ‘Power in Numbers’ when you are not the underdog, does each tempered fighter need to be adjacent to the other 2 tempered fighters (i.e. in a triangle)?
A: Yes.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Risky Position
description: Score this in an end phase if a tempered friendly fighter is in enemy territory.

name: Sneak Into Position
description: Score this immediately after an opponent's Action step if 2 or more tempered friendly fighters are adjacent to the same enemy fighter.

name: Trial of the Tempered
description: Score this in an end phase if each fighter is tempered.

name: Two-pronged Assault
description: Score this in an end phase if 2 or more tempered friendly fighters are in enemy territory.

name: Usurper
description: Score this in an end phase if an enemy leader was slain by a tempered friendly fighter this battle round.

name: Death Throes
description: Pick a tempered friendly fighter. In the next Action step, Attacks that target this fighter have -2 Attack dice.

name: Fake Out!
description: Pick an enemy fighter with a Health characteristic of 3 or more that is adjacent to a tempered friendly fighter, and then roll an Attack dice. If the roll contains any Smash or Fury, inflict 1 damage on that fighter, and then give that fighter a stagger token. If you are the underdog, the roll can also contain Critical success.

name: Final Stand
description: In the next Action step, tempered friendly fighters cannot be pushed.

name: Opportunity Strikes
description: Play this immediately after you pick a weapon as part of an Attack for a tempered friendly fighter. That weapon had +1 Attack dice for that Attack.

name: Power from Death
description: Play this immediately after a friendly fighter with a bounty of 1 or more is slain by an enemy fighter, if that fighter was tempered before inflicting the damage that would slay them. Draw up to 3 Power cards.

name: Running Riot
description: Play this immediately after a tempered friendly fighter's successful Attack. Pick another friendly fighter. That fighter is tempered.

name: Sidestep
description: Pick a friendly fighter. Push that fighter 1 hex.

name: Spiteful Traps
description: Pick an enemy fighter with a Health characteristic of 3 or more within 2 hexes of your leader. Give that fighter a Move token.

name: Synchronised Effort
description: Pick 2 tempered friendly fighters within 4 hexes of each other. Remove those fighters from the battlefield and then place each in the hex the other was removed from.

name: The Uprising!
description: All friendly fighters are tempered in the next Action step.

name: Dark Horse
description: This fighter is tempered.

name: Deadly Aim
description: This fighter's weapons have Ensnare.

name: Fuelled by Pain
description: Melee Attack action Range 1 Axe X Damage 2 Critical success Ensnare. X is equal to the number of damage tokens this fighter has.

name: Great Fortitude
description: This fighter has +1 Health.

name: Impervious
description: While this fighter is tempered, Save rolls for this fighter cannot be affected by Cleave and Ensnare.

name: Lash Out
description: Thrash: Immediately after this fighter is slain, before removing them from the battlefield, roll a number of Save dice equal to the battle round. For each Block, give an enemy fighter within 2 hexes of this fighter a Move token.

name: Mobbed!
description: When this fighter Attacks, if the target is within 3 hexes of any other friendly fighters, the target is Flanked and Surrounded for that Attack.

name: Parting Shot
description: Pyrrhic Strike: Immediately after this fighter is slain by an enemy fighter, before removing them from the battlefield, pick an enemy fighter within 2 hexes of them. Give that fighter a stagger token. If this fighter was tempered before inflicting the damage that would slay them, inflict 1 damage on that fighter.

name: Pesky Nuisance
description: Enemy fighters adjacent to this fighter must target this fighter with any Attacks.

name: Sharpened Points
description: This fighter's weapons have Cleave.

name: Aim for the Top
description: Score this in an end phase if the total Bounty characteristic of slain and/or damaged enemy fighters is 4 or more.

name: Arena Mortis
description: Score this in an end phase if all fighters in the same territory have Charge tokens and their total Bounty characteristic is 4 or more.

name: Best Foot Forward
description: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's successful Attack if that fighter has any Charge tokens and is in enemy territory.

name: Bloodbathed Rampager
description: Score this in an end phase if a friendly fighter has 2 or more Charge tokens.

name: Bloody Momentum
description: Score this in an end phase if 2 or more friendly fighters with a total Bounty characteristic of 4 or more have Charge tokens and are in enemy territory.

name: Frenzied Rush
description: Score this immediately after an Action step if friendly fighters with a total Bounty characteristic of 3 or more have Charge tokens and are in enemy territory.

name: Living Bludgeon
description: Score this immediately after an Action step if a friendly fighter has a Guard token and a Charge token and is not in friendly territory.

name: Red Aftermath
description: Score this in an end phase if the total Bounty characteristic of slain enemy fighters is 2 or more.

name: Sally Forth
description: Score this immediately after your opponent's Action step if a friendly fighter with any Charge tokens holds a treasure token in enemy territory.

name: Savage Sprinter
description: Score this immediately after an Action step if a friendly fighter in enemy territory has 2 or more Move tokens.

name: Unrelenting Massacre
description: Score this in an end phase if all fighters have Charge tokens.

name: Vicious Brawl
description: Score this immediately after an Action step if there are 3 or more fighters with Charge tokens adjacent to each other. If you are the underdog, there can be 2 or more fighters instead.
faq:
Q: Can you clarify the conditions of ‘Vicious Brawl’?
A: If you are not the underdog, each fighter with a Charge token must be adjacent to at least two other fighters with Charge tokens.

Q: To score ‘Vicious Brawl’ when you are not the underdog, does each fighter with Charge tokens need to be adjacent to the other 2 fighters with Charge tokens (i.e. in a triangle)?
A: Yes.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Braced
description: Pick a friendly fighter. Give that fighter a Charge token.

name: Catch Weapon
description: Play this immediately after a fighter's successful Attack. Give that fighter a Charge token.

name: Diving In
description: Pick a friendly fighter. Push that fighter up to 2 hexes. That push must end adjacent to any fighters with Charge tokens.

name: Get It Done
description: Pick 2 friendly fighters. Remove a Charge token from 1 of those fighters and then give the other fighter a Charge token.

name: Lost Legacy
description: Play this immediately after you discard a slain friendly fighter's Upgrades. Pick 1 of those Upgrades, put it in your hand then draw 1 Power card.

name: Outburst
description: Pick a friendly fighter with any Charge tokens. Roll an Attack dice for each enemy fighter adjacent to them. If you are the underdog, roll a number of dice equal to the battle round number instead. If the roll contains any Smash, inflict 1 damage on that fighter.

name: Over to You
description: Play this immediately before removing a slain friendly fighter's tokens if that fighter was slain by an attacker and had any Move, Charge, Guard and/or Stagger tokens. Pick a friendly fighter or the attacker. Give the fighter you picked all of the slain fighter's Move, Charge, Guard and Stagger tokens.

name: Push Through
description: Pick a friendly fighter with a Bounty characteristic of 2 or less. Inflict 1 damage on that fighter. In your next Action step, that fighter can use Core abilities as if they did not have any Move or Charge tokens.

name: Quick Shift
description: Pick a friendly fighter that has any Move tokens. Remove 1 of that fighter's Move tokens and then give that fighter a Charge token.

name: Reckless Attitudes
description: Enemy fighters cannot use Core abilities other than the Charge ability in the next Action step.
faq:
Q: Does ‘Reckless Attitudes’ allow a fighter to Charge even if they have one or more Charge tokens?
A: No.

Q: Can I use Core abilities that are used by the player and not a fighter, such as ‘Hammertide’, while ‘Reckless Attitudes’ is in effect?
A: Yes.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Bellowing Tyrant
description: Bellow: This fighter can use this Core ability if they have any Charge tokens. Push each other friendly fighter with any Charge tokens up to 2 hexes. Then, pick 1 of those fighters. Remove 1 of that fighter's Charge tokens.
faq:
Q: Can a fighter equipped with ‘Bellowing Tyrant’ use the Upgrade’s Core ability if they have no Charge tokens?
A: No.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Bladecatcher
description: While this fighter is the target of an Attack, the attacker cannot use Weapon abilities.

name: Blades of Wrath
description: If this fighter is slain, before removing them from the battlefield, roll a number of Attack dice equal to the battle round number for each enemy fighter adjacent to them. If the roll contains any Smash, inflict 1 damage on that fighter.

name: Furious Might
description: This fighter's melee weapons have Grievous while this fighter has any Charge tokens and is not using the Charge ability.

name: Fury of Aqshy
description: Fighters adjacent to this fighter cannot use Core abilities other than the Charge ability.
faq:
Q: Does ‘Fury of Aqshy’ allow an adjacent fighter to Charge even if they have one or more Charge tokens?
A: No.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Headcase
description: If this fighter has no Charge tokens, instead of playing a Power card in a Power step, you can give this fighter a Charge token.

name: Headlong Charge
description: This fighter has +2 Move while using the Charge ability.

name: Keen Eye
description: This fighter's melee weapons have +1 Attack dice.

name: Still Swinging
description: This fighter's melee weapons have Ensnare while this fighter has any Charge tokens and is not using the Charge ability.

name: Utter Ignorance
description: If this fighter would be slain, they are not slain. Remove damage tokens from this fighter until they are vulnerable and then discard this card.

name: Alone in the Dark
description: Score this in an end phase if no fighters are adjacent.

name: Bloody and Bruised
description: Score this immediately after your warband inflicts damage on an enemy fighter if 3 or more fighters are damaged.

name: Careful Advance
description: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter Moves if 2 or more friendly fighters that have Move tokens are in enemy territory.

name: Living on the Edge
description: Score this in an end phase if a vulnerable friendly fighter is in enemy territory.

name: Low on Options
description: Score this immediately after you discard a Power card if 5 or more Ploy cards are in your Power discard pile.
faq:
Q: Can I score ‘Low on Options’ when a friendly fighter is slain and their Upgrades are broken if I meet the other conditions on the card?
A: Yes.

Q: Can I score ‘Low on Options’ in the end phase after discarding a Power card?
A: Yes.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Out of the Frying Pan
description: Score this in an end phase if 3 or more damaged friendly fighters that have Move and/or Charge tokens are in enemy territory.

name: Ploymaster
description: Score this in an end phase if you played 3 or more Ploys this battle round.

name: Predictable End
description: Score this immediately after an ability on a friendly Wrack and Ruin card inflicts damage on an enemy fighter holding a treasure token.

name: Spread Out!
description: Score this in an end phase if there is a friendly fighter in each territory.

name: Stay Close
description: Score this in an end phase if there are no fighters in edge hexes.

name: Strong Start
description: Score this immediately after an enemy fighter is slain if that fighter was the first fighter slain this combat phase.

name: Unsafe Ground
description: Score this immediately after your warband inflicts damage on an enemy fighter in an edge hex. If you are the underdog, that enemy fighter can be within 1 hex of an edge hex instead.

name: Confusion
description: Pick 2 adjacent fighters. Remove those fighters from the battlefield and then place each in the hex the other was removed from.

name: Damned if you Do
description: Your opponent must pick 1 of the following abilities for you to resolve:Pick an enemy fighter. Push that fighter 1 hex.Pick an enemy fighter that is not vulnerable. Inflict 1 damage on that fighter.

name: Deadly Traps
description: Play this immediately after a friendly fighter's drawn Attack if the target is not vulnerable and was driven back. Inflict 1 damage on the target.

name: Fault Lines
description: Pick an undamaged enemy fighter. Inflict 1 damage on that fighter. Then, your opponent can pick a fighter. Inflict 1 damage on that fighter.

name: Fireproof
description: The first time damage is inflicted on a friendly fighter in the next turn, reduce that damage to 1.

name: Flee!
description: Pick a friendly fighter in friendly territory. That fighter has +3 Move in your next Action step. If that fighter Moves in that Action step, that Move cannot end in friendly territory.

name: Ominous Rumbling
description: Your opponent must pick 1 of the following abilities for you to resolve:Pick 2 enemy fighters. Give each of those fighters a Stagger token.Pick an enemy fighter that is not vulnerable. Inflict 1 damage on that fighter.

name: Sidle Up
description: Pick a friendly fighter. Push that fighter up to 2 hexes. That push must end adjacent to 2 or more fighters.

name: Vicious Intent
description: Play this immediately after you pick a melee weapon as part of an Attack. That weapon has +1 Attack dice for that Attack. If the target is undamaged, that weapon has +2 Attack dice for that Attack instead.

name: Volcanic Eruption
description: Pick a fighter. Then your opponent can pick an enemy fighter. Starting with the fighter you picked, roll a number of Attack dice for each of those fighters equal to their Bounty characteristic, to a minimum of 1. If the roll contains any Smash, inflict 1 damage on that fighter.
faq:
Q: If I play ‘Volcanic Eruption’, when it says that your opponent can pick an ‘enemy’ fighter, what fighter does my opponent pick?
A: Your opponent can pick a fighter from their warband.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Barge
description: Barge: This fighter can use this Core ability if they have no Move and/or Charge tokens. This fighter Moves. That Move must end adjacent to an enemy fighter. Give this fighter a Charge token. Then, pick an enemy fighter adjacent to this fighter. Push that fighter 1 hex then give them a Stagger token.

name: Desperate Defence
description: While this fighter is the target of an Attack, the attacker's weapons have -1 Damage. The next time damage is inflicted on this fighter as part on an Attack, discard this card.
faq:
Q: When does ‘Desperate Defence’ effectively reduce damage during an Attack?
A: When damage is inflicted.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Fiery Temper
description: Belligerent: Immediately after this fighter has been picked to be pushed, you can inflict 1 damage on this fighter. If you do so, this fighter is not pushed.
faq:
Q: If a fighter equipped with ‘Fiery Temper’ is going to be driven back by an Attack, can that fighter take 1 damage instead of being pushed?
A: Yes.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Great Speed
description: This fighter has +1 Move.

name: Henchman
description: Disciplined: Immediately after you make an Attack roll for this fighter, you can change 1 result to Single support. You cannot re-roll Attack rolls for this fighter.

name: Misfortune
description: Ill-fated: Immediately after this fighter uses a Core ability, you can inflict 1 damage on this fighter. Then, you can remove this Upgrade from this fighter and equip another friendly fighter with this Upgrade.

name: Rock-splitting Tread
description: Stomp: Immediately after your last Action step in a battle round, pick an adjacent enemy fighter that is not vulnerable. Inflict 1 damage on that fighter. Then, roll an Attack dice. On an Smash, discard this card.

name: Sundering Weapon
description: This fighter's melee weapons have Cleave.

name: Unstoppable
description: While this fighter is vulnerable, each time 1 damage is inflicted on this fighter, reduce that damage to 0.
faq:
Q: If I use the ‘Unstoppable’ Upgrade to reduce the damage inflicted by the ‘Misfortune’ Upgrade to 0, can I still equip another friendly fighter with the ‘Misfortune’ Upgrade?
A: Yes.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Wary Tread
description: You can use this ability after the last Power step in a battle round. Push this fighter 1 hex. That push cannot end adjacent to any fighters.

name: Strike the Head
description: Score this immediately after an enemy fighter is slain by a friendly fighter if the target was a leader or the target's Health characteristic was equal to or greater than the attacker's.

name: Branching Fate
description: Score this immediately after you make an Attack roll that contained 3 or more dice if each result was a different symbol. If you are the underdog, the Attack roll can contain 2 or more dice instead.
faq:
Q: Can the ‘Branching Fate’ and ‘Critical Effort’ Objective cards be scored before re-rolling dice for things like Stagger or other Surge abilities that allow re-rolls?
A: No, the new result replaces the old roll See ‘Re-roll’ in the Core Rules.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Perfect Strike
description: Score this immediately after you make an Attack roll if all of the results were successes.

name: Critical Effort
description: Score this immediately after you make an Attack roll if any of the results was a Critical success.
faq:
Q: Can the ‘Branching Fate’ and ‘Critical Effort’ Objective cards be scored before re-rolling dice for things like Stagger or other Surge abilities that allow re-rolls?
A: No, the new result replaces the old roll See ‘Re-roll’ in the Core Rules.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Get Stuck In
description: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's Attack if the target was in enemy territory.
faq:
Q: Can I score ‘Get Stuck In’ if the target of the attack was not in enemy territory before the attack?
A: No.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Strong Start
description: Score this immediately after an enemy fighter is slain if that fighter was the first fighter slain this combat phase.

name: Keep Choppin'
description: Score this in an end phase if your warband Attacked 3 or more times this combat phase.

name: Fields of Blood
description: Score this in an end phase if 4 or more fighters are damaged and/or slain.

name: Go All Out
description: Score this in an end phase if 5 or more fighters have Move and/or Charge tokens.

name: On the Edge
description: Score this in an end phase if any enemy fighters are vulnerable.

name: Denial
description: Score this in an end phase if there are no enemy fighters in friendly territory.

name: Annihilation
description: Score this in an end phase if each enemy fighter is slain.

name: Determined Effort
description: Play this immediately after you pick a weapon as part of an Attack. That weapon has +1 Attack dice for that Attack. If you are the underdog, that weapon has +2 Attack dice for that Attack instead.

name: Twist the Knife
description: Play this immediately after you pick a melee weapon as part of an Attack. That weapon has Grievous for that Attack.

name: Lure of Battle
description: Pick 1 friendly fighter that is within 2 hexes of another fighter. Push the other fighter 1 hex closer to that friendly fighter.

name: Sidestep
description: Pick a friendly fighter. Push that fighter 1 hex.

name: Commanding Stride
description: Push your leader up to 3 hexes. That push must end in a starting hex.

name: Illusory Fighter
description: Pick a friendly fighter. Remove that fighter from the battlefield, and then place that fighter in an empty starting hex in friendly territory.

name: Wings of War
description: Play this immediately after you pick a fighter to Move. That fighter has +2 Move for that Move.
faq:
Q: Does ‘Wings of War’ grant +2 Move when a fighter makes a Move as part of a Charge ability?
A: Yes.

Q: Can I make a Charge if I don’t have any viable targets for my Attack within range before using ‘Wings of War’?
A: Yes.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Shields Up!
description: Pick a friendly fighter. Give that fighter a Guard token.

name: Scream of Anger
description: Pick a friendly fighter. Inflict 2 damage on that fighter and then remove 1 of that fighter's Move or Charge tokens.

name: Healing Potion
description: Pick a friendly fighter. Heal that fighter. If you are the underdog, you can roll a Save dice. On a Block or Critical success, heal that fighter again.

name: Brawler
description: This fighter cannot be Flanked or Surrounded.

name: Hidden Aid
description: Enemy fighters adjacent to this fighter are Flanked.

name: Accurate
description: Strike True: After you make an Attack roll for this fighter, you can immediately re-roll 1 Attack dice in that Attack roll.

name: Great Strength
description: This fighter's melee weapons have Grievous.

name: Deadly Aim
description: This fighter's weapons have Ensnare.

name: Sharpened Points
description: This fighter's weapons have Cleave.

name: Duellist
description: Footwork: Immediately after this fighter has Attacked, you can push this fighter 1 hex.

name: Tough
description: No more than 3 damage can be inflicted on this fighter in the same turn.

name: Great Fortitude
description: This fighter has +1 Health.

name: Keen Eye
description: This fighter's melee weapons have +1 Attack dice.

name: Sally Forth
description: Score this immediately after your opponent's Action step if a friendly fighter with any Charge tokens hold a treasure token in enemy territory.

name: Stand Firm
description: Score this immediately after your opponent's Action step if a friendly fighter with any Stagger tokens holds a treasure token in enemy territory.

name: Step by Step
description: Score this immediately after your opponent's Action step if a friendly fighter with any Move tokens holds a treasure token in enemy territory. If you are the underdog, that friendly fighter can have any Charge tokens instead.

name: Unassailable
description: Score this immediately after an enemy fighter's Attack if a friendly fighter holding a treasure token was the target of that Attack.
faq:
Q: Does the ‘Unassailable’ Objective card require the target of the Attack to be holding a treasure token at the time of the Attack?
A: No.

Q: Does the ‘Unassailable’ Objective card require the target of the Attack to be holding a treasure token after the Attack is resolved?
A: Yes.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Aggressive Defender
description: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's Attack if the attacker is holding a treasure token.
faq:
Q: Can ‘Aggressive Defender’ be scored if a friendly fighter uses either the ‘Swift Step’ or ‘Duellist’ Upgrade to push them onto a treasure token after the Attack was made?
A: No.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Careful Advance
description: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter Moves if 2 or more friendly fighters that have Move tokens are in enemy territory.

name: Hold Treasure Token 1 or 2
description: Score this in an end phase if a friendly fighter holds treasure token 1 or 2.

name: Hold Treasure Token 3 or 4
description: Score this in an end phase if a friendly fighter holds treasure token 3 or 4.

name: Hold Treasure Token 5
description: Score this in an end phase if a friendly fighter holds treasure token 5.

name: Slow Advance
description: Score this in an end phase if your warband holds any treasure tokens in both neutral territory and enemy territory.

name: Iron Grasp
description: Score this in an end phase if your warband holds all of the treasure tokens in a friendly and/or enemy territory.

name: Supremacy
description: Score this in an end phase if 2 or more friendly fighters with a total Bounty characteristic of 3 or more hold treasure tokens.

name: Switch Things Up
description: Pick 2 treasure tokens. Swap the positions of those treasure tokens.

name: Sidestep
description: Pick a friendly fighter. Push that fighter 1 hex.

name: The Extra Mile
description: Play this immediately after a friendly fighter Moves. Push that fighter 1 hex. That push must end on a feature token.

name: Settle In
description: Pick a friendly fighter on a feature token. Give that fighter a Guard token.

name: Healing Potion
description: Pick a friendly fighter. Heal that fighter. If you are the underdog, you can roll a Save dice. On a Block or Critical success, heal that fighter again.

name: Hidden Paths
description: Pick a friendly fighter in an edge hex. Remove that fighter from the battlefield, and then place that fighter in a different empty edge hex. Then, give that fighter a Move token, unless you are the underdog.

name: Confusion
description: Pick 2 adjacent fighters. Remove those fighters from the battlefield and then place each in the hex the other was removed from.

name: Hold the Line!
description: Fighters cannot be driven back. This effect persists until the end of the next Action step.

name: Shoulder Throw
description: Play this immediately after a friendly fighter's successful Attack if the target is adjacent. Remove the target from the battlefield, and then place them in a different empty hex adjacent to the attacker.

name: By the Numbers
description: Draw a number of Power cards equal to the number of treasure tokens held by your warband.

name: Stubborn to the End
description: If this fighter is the target of an Attack, the attacker cannot use Overrun.

name: Inviolate
description: This fighter cannot be Flanked or Surrounded while they hold a treasure token.

name: Great Speed
description: This fighter has +1 Move.

name: Sharp Reflexes
description: This fighter has +1 Save, to a maximum of 2.

name: Brute Momentum
description: This fighter cannot be driven back while they have any Charge tokens.

name: Agile
description: Deft: After you make a Save roll for this fighter, you can immediately re-roll 1 Save dice in that Save roll.

name: Duellist
description: Footwork: Immediately after this fighter has Attacked, you can push this fighter 1 hex.

name: Great Fortitude
description: This fighter has +1 Health.

name: Keen Eye
description: This fighter's melee weapons have +1 Attack dice.

name: Great Strength
description: This fighter's melee weapons have Grievous.

name: Broken Prospects
description: Score this in an end phase if 3 or more different treasure tokens were Delved by your warband this battle round or if a treasure token held by an enemy fighter at the start of the battle round was Delved by your warband this battle round.

name: Against the Odds
description: Score this in an end phase if an odd-numbered treasure token was Delved by your warband this battle round.

name: Lost in the Depths
description: Score this in an end phase if no friendly fighters are adjacent and any friendly fighters are not slain.
faq:
Q: Can I score ‘Lost in the Depths’ if no surviving friendly fighters are adjacent to each other, but they are adjacent to enemy fighters?
A: Yes.
Current as of official Rules Updates, February 2026

name: Desolate Homeland
description: Score this in an end phase if there are 1 or fewer treasure tokens in friendly territory.

name: Torn Landscape
description: Score this in an end phase if there are 2 or fewer treasure tokens on the battlefield.

name: Strip the Realm
description: Score this in an end phase if there are no treasure tokens on the battlefield or if no enemy fighters hold any treasure tokens.

name: Aggressive Claimant
description: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's successful Attack if the target was in neutral territory, or the target was holding a treasure token when you picked them to be the target of that Attack and is no longer holding that treasure token.

name: Claim the Prize
description: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter Delves in enemy territory. If you are the underdog, that Delve can be in friendly territory instead.

name: Delving for Wealth
description: Score this immediately after your warband Delves for the third or subsequent time this combat phase.

name: Share the Load
description: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter Moves, if that fighter and any other friendly fighters are each on feature tokens.

name: Hostile Takeover
description: Score this immediately after the second or subsequent Attack made by your warband that was not part of a Charge.

name: Careful Survey
description: Score this immediately after an Action step if there is a friendly fighter in each territory.

name: Sidestep
description: Pick a friendly fighter. Push that fighter 1 hex.

name: Prideful Duellist
description: Play this immediately after a friendly fighter's Attack if the attacker is in enemy territory. Heal the attacker.

name: Commanding Stride
description: Push your leader up to 3 hexes. That push must end in a starting hex.

name: Crumbling Mine
description: Pick a treasure token that is not held. Flip that treasure token.

name: Explosive Charges
description: Domain: Friendly fighters have +1 Move while using Charge abilities. This effect persists until the end of the battle round or until another Domain card is played.

name: Wary Delver
description: Pick a friendly fighter with any Charge tokens. Give that fighter a Guard token.

name: Brash Scout
description: Play this immediately after you make an Attack roll for a fighter in enemy territory. Re-roll 1 dice in that Attack roll. If you are the underdog, you can re-roll each dice in that Attack roll instead.

name: Sudden Blast
description: Pick an enemy fighter adjacent to a friendly fighter. Give that enemy fighter a Stagger token.

name: Tunnelling Terror
description: Pick a friendly fighter with no Move or Charge tokens. Remove that fighter from the battlefield, and then place that fighter in an empty stagger hex. Then, give that fighter a Charge token. If you are the underdog, you can give that fighter a Move token instead.

name: Trapped Cache
description: Pick an undamaged enemy fighter within 1 hex of a treasure token. Inflict 1 damage on that fighter.

name: Great Speed
description: This fighter have +1 Move.

name: Swift Step
description: Quick: Immediately after this fighter has Charged, you can push this fighter 1 hex.

name: Burrowing Strike
description: Melee Attack action Range 2 Sword 2 Damage 2 This weapon has +1 Attack dice while this fighter has any Stagger tokens or is on a feature token.

name: Tough Enough
description: While this fighter is in enemy territory, Save rolls for this fighter cannot be affected by Cleave and Ensnare.

name: Canny Sapper
description: Sneaky: Immediately after you play a Ploy in a Power step, you can remove this fighter from the battlefield. Place this fighter in an empty stagger hex or in an empty starting hex in friendly territory, and then discard this card.

name: Impossibly Quick
description: This fighter has +1 Save.Immediately discard this Upgrade after an enemy fighter's failed Attack if this fighter was the target.

name: Linebreaker
description: This fighter's weapons have Brutal.

name: Excavating Blast
description: Ranged Attack action Range 3 Axe 2 Damage 1 This weapon has Stagger while this fighter is in enemy territory.

name: Gloryseeker
description: This fighter's melee weapons have Grievous if the target has a Health characteristic of 4 or more.

name: Frenzy of Greed
description: While this fighter is on a treasure token in enemy territory or is in a stagger hex, Save rolls for this fighter are not affected by Cleave and Ensnare and this fighter cannot be given Stagger tokens.

name: Spread Havoc
description: Score this in an end phase. Gain a number of Glory points equal to your Cataclysm value, to a maximum of 2.

name: Hounds of War
description: Score this in an end phase if 2 or more enemy fighters are slain and/or damaged and any of those fighters were slain in the preceding combat phase.

name: Set Explosives
description: Score this in an end phase if your warband holds 2 or more treasure tokens and holds all of the treasure tokens in any territories.

name: Wreckers
description: Score this in an end phase if the number of damaged and/or slain enemy fighters is greater than your Cataclysm value.

name: Uneven Contest
description: Score this in an end phase if your warband holds each odd-numbered treasure token.

name: Loaded for Bear
description: Score this in an end phase if any friendly fighters are each equipped with 3 or more Upgrades.

name: Collateral Damage
description: Score this immediately after you advance your Cataclysm tracker 1 step as a result of a friendly fighter being slain. If you are the underdog, score this after you advance your Cataclysm tracker 1 step for any reason instead.

name: Too Close for Comfort
description: Score this immediately after your opponent's Power step if each friendly fighter is within 2 hexes of any enemy fighters.

name: Shocking Assault
description: Score this immediately after your opponent's Action step if your warband holds all of the treasure tokens in neutral territory.

name: Nowhere to Run
description: Score this immediately after an Action step if all friendly fighters have Move and/or Charge tokens and there is a friendly fighter in each territory.

name: The Perfect Cut
description: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's successful melee Attack if no result in the target's Save roll was a success.

name: Overwhelming Force
description: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's successful melee Attack if the Attack roll contained 4 or more dice.

name: Savage Blow
description: Play this immediately after you pick a weapon as part of an Attack. Rolls of Double support count as successes for that Attack.

name: The End is Nigh
description: Domain: After each Action step, the player whose turn it is rolls a number of Attack dice equal to their Cataclysm value, or 1 Attack dice if they have no such value.If the roll contains any Fury or Critical success, their opponent must discard a Power card. This effect persists until the end of the battle round, until another Domain card is played, or until you advance your Cataclysm tracker.

name: Growing Concerns
description: Enemy fighters have -X Move in the next Action step, where X is your Cataclysm value.

name: Total Collapse
description: Roll a number of Attack dice equal to your Cataclysm value. If the roll contains Fury or Critical success, pick a fighter.Inflict 1 damage on that fighter. If you picked a friendly fighter, you can inflict damage on that fighter up to your Cataclysm value instead.

name: Violent Blast
description: Pick a stagger hex. Push each fighter within 1 hex of that stagger hex 1 hex.

name: Sunder the Realm
description: Roll a number of Attack dice equal to your Cataclysm value for each fighter within 1 hex of neutral territory.If the roll contains any Smash or Critical success, inflict 1 damage on that fighter.

name: Raging Tremors
description: Pick a number of enemy fighters up to your Cataclysm value. Give each of those fighters a Stagger token.

name: Counter-charge
description: Play this immediately after a friendly fighter is picked to be the target of an Attack. Pick another friendly fighter. Push that fighter up to 3 hexes. That push must end adjacent to the attacker.

name: Do or Die
description: Pick a friendly fighter. Inspire that fighter. This effect persists for X Action steps where X is your Cataclysm value. After that effect ends, do not discard this card. Instead, Uninspire that fighter. That fighter cannot be Inspired again. This effect persists until the end of the game.

name: Improvised Attack
description: Pick a friendly fighter. That fighter immediately Attacks with the following weapon, where X is your Cataclysm value.Ranged Attack action Range 3 Axe X Damage 1 This weapon cannot be modified.

name: Bringer of Doom
description: Tick Tock: After this card is discarded during a Combat Phase, you can immediately advance your Cataclysm tracker 1 step.

name: Visions of Ruin
description: This fighter has +X Move, where X is your cataclysm value.Immediately after this fighter Moves, give this fighter a Stagger token.

name: Extinction's Edge
description: Ever Closer: Immediately advance your Cataclysm tracker 1 step after an enemy fighter is slain by this fighter. Then, if your Cataclysm value is 2 or greater, discard this card.

name: Driven by Pain
description: Insensate: Immediately after this fighter is driven back, you can heal this fighter.

name: Inescapable Grasp
description: This fighter's melee weapons have Ensnare.

name: Utter Conviction
description: This fighter's Save characteristic is X, where X is your Cataclysm value, and cannot be modified further.This fighter cannot use Critical Weapon abilities.

name: Burnt Out
description: Smoulder: Pick a friendly fighter. Give that fighter a Stagger token. Then, draw 2 Power cards. If you are the underdog, draw 3 Power cards instead.

name: Great Fortitude
description: This fighter has +1 Health.

name: Hurled Weapon
description: Ranged Attack action Range 3 Axe 2 Damage 1 Critical success Cleave

name: Desperate Rage
description: Melee Attack action Range 1 Axe 2 Damage 3 Immediately after this fighter has Attacked with this weapon, inflict 1 damage on this fighter.
